description: Composition Red and white T-shirt for boys made of 100% recycled polyester, has a round neckline, short raglan sleeves with a rubber stripe, rubber print on the front with Arsenal branding in rubber print on the chest and branding printed at the back Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Line dry Designed for your training needs, this nike T-shirt is made of polyester fabric engineered with Dri-Fit technology to offer absolute sweat-free, fresh comfort. These properties make it ideal not just for training, but playing any sport even on a hot day. Team this with Sports shorts and performance shoes, or tracks and floaters for unparalleled cool.
